ISSUE Nº 21 · JUNE 2026

GOGO YUBARI

From the machine

Editor's Letter

June turned out 8 finishes — some smoother than others. The Studio Trousers was the one that fought back — 6 hours and a fair amount of swearing. Lesson filed: wouters french terry does not forgive a rushed seam. As ever — everything here was made, worn, unpicked or sworn at by the editor herself.

— M
